basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 01-01-2026. For SC/ST/OBC and women candidates, age relaxation will be applicable as per GoI.

qualification.education_qualification: First-Class M.Tech./M.E./MSc./MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/Mathematics and Computing/Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in Computational fluid dynamics (CFD), finite element analysis (FEA), and medical image processing, Proficiency in ANSYS Fluent, COMSOL Multiphysics, MATLAB, Python programming, and image-processing software (3D Slicer), Prior research experience in computational modeling of human tumors biomechanics, PhD in relevant research areas
qualification.details: A First-Class M.Tech./M.E./MSc./MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/ Mathematics and Computing/ Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in Computational fluid dynamics (CFD), finite element analysis (FEA), and medical image processing. Proficiency in ANSYS Fluent, COMSOL Multiphysics, MATLAB, Python programming, and image-processing software (3D Slicer). Prior research experience in computational modeling of human tumors biomechanics. PhD in relevant research areas.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A First-Class M.Tech./M.E./MSc./MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/ Mathematics and Computing/ Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in Computational fluid dynamics (CFD), finite element analysis (FEA), and medical image processing. Proficiency in ANSYS Fluent, COMSOL Multiphysics, MATLAB, Python programming, and image-processing software (3D Slicer). Prior research experience in computational modeling of human tumors biomechanics. PhD in relevant research areas.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 01-01-2026. For SC/ST/OBC and women candidates, age relaxation will be applicable as per GoI.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First-Class M.Tech./M.E./MSc./MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/Mathematics and Computing/Applied Mathematics with specific skills in CFD, FEA, and medical image processing.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,000 per month, plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT (ISM) Dhanbad offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC and women candidates as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential technical skills required for this position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in ANSYS Fluent, COMSOL Multiphysics, MATLAB, Python programming, and image-processing software like 3D Slicer is essential.

faq.question: Q10. Is prior research experience necessary for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, prior research experience in computational modeling of human tumors biomechanics is a required qualification for this position.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.
